info.title: FarmENGAGE Data API
info.description: API for managing agricultural data including clients, farms, fields, boundaries, guidance lines, landmarks, crop zones, vehicles, contacts, management zones, prescriptions, work orders, equipment activities, layers, materials, documents, imagery, and inventory.

post.description: Generates an ADAPT token for an applicationId.

get.description: Get a list of Inventory Balances for a given crop year.
Get Inventory Balance detail for a Material.
Get the list of Boundaries for an organization.

get.description: Get detail for a Boundary.
Get list of Clients for an organization.

post.description: Create a Client for an organization.

get.description: Get Client details.

get.description: Get Farm details.

includeLinks.name: includeLinks

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid bearer token

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Tokens expire after 1 hour.
